response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and web developer, but lacks the specialized hardware and AI accelerator expertise required for this Principal Performance Architect role. There is no evidence of SoC/IP modeling, deep-learning workload optimization, or GPU/SIMD architecture experience.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience across multiple paradigms (web, mobile, embedded) and languages.
Strong background in high-performance web services and asynchronous I/O handling high request volumes.
Meets the baseline requirement of a Bachelor's degree with over 8 years of technical experience.
concerns: Lacks any demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators.
No background in deep neural network training or inference performance optimization.
Missing preferred qualifications such as SIMD/MIMD and GPU architecture experience.
